creator: keramida@ceid.upatras.gr
text:
The second pretest of Emacs 23.X was released on Feb 25:

  http://lists.gnu.org/archive/html/emacs-devel/2009-02/msg00848.html

I have updated the editors/emacs-devel port to use this pretest tarball,
and ports/Mk/bsd.emacs.mk for the new emacs-devel version.
